title: Photoshop Productivity Boost: Master Group Export to JPG/PNG [Script Walkthrough + Free Download]
description:
🚀 Streamline your Photoshop projects with this game-changing script for exporting groups into JPG or PNG formats! Whether you're creating mockups for design markets or just organizing your work more efficiently, this tutorial will show you how to save time and effort in your design process.

📌 In this video, I demonstrate how to use a Photoshop script that I've developed, ideal for exporting preview images from various mockups. This versatile tool allows you to choose between JPG and PNG formats and automatically names the exported images according to your group names.

🖼️ Step-by-Step Guide:

- Creating and Organizing Mockups: Learn to create mockups and organize them into groups.
- Exporting Images Efficiently: Understand how to save images in your preferred format, with the same names as your Photoshop groups.
- Customizing Designs: Discover how to replace designs within smart objects for updated mockup previews.
- Streamlining the Process: See the time-saving benefits of exporting
